captions: click the item next to sign me up! icon
swipe until tell me more. button
launch the tell me more. at the bottom
turn off the button next to the not now.
click the button to the left of the not now. item
turn off the icon below achievemint is a icon
turn on the tell me more. item
open item to the right of the sign me up! icon

"content-desc": [null], "rel-bounds": [18, 80, 1159, 955], "focused": false, "selected": false, "scrollable-vertical": true, "children": [{"text": "AchieveMint is a rewards program that gives you points towards cash rewards for engaging in healthy activities in this app and others. 

When you sign up for AchieveMint and you engage in certain activities in Excel At Life's apps such as completing a cognitive diary entry, taking a test, reading an article, tracking your behavior, or listening to an audio, your action may be submitted to receive points. 

The purpose of this program is to help motivate you to engage in the healthy life-improving activities offered in these apps. Excel At Life hopes that the addition of the AchieveMint program will help make these apps more effective for those who want to use the CBT methods but have difficulty with motivation. And for those who are already motivated, a little extra reward is nice! 

AchieveMint.com is responsible for administering this program and will pay you according to their policies. Excel At Life is only offering you the opportunity to participate and is NOT responsible for payment. 

If you choose "Sign me up!" you will see a screen requesting your email address. Once you submit your email to AchieveMint.com, you will start receiving points for different activities in this app.
